# Bel Ağrısı Serisi — Derleme (2026-05-17)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Low back pain during prolonged sitting on a sofa is associated with pelvic posterior tilt in individuals with non-specific chronic low back pain.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik bel ağrısı during prolonged sitting on a sofa is associated with pelvic posterior tilt in individuals with non-specific chronic bel ağrısı. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: european spine journal : official publication of the european spine society, the european spinal deformity society, and the european section of the cervical spine research society. 2026 may 16. Anahtar kavramlar: european, spine, society, low, back, ağrı.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42141190/

### The association between pain sensitivity and hip and lumbar joint excursion during a lifting task in people with chronic low back pain.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik the association between ağrı sensitivity and hip and lomber (bel bölgesi) joint excursion during a lifting task in people with chronic bel ağrısı. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of electromyography and kinesiology : official journal of the international society of electrophysiological kinesiology. 2026 may 8. Anahtar kavramlar: ağrı, journal, kinesiology, association, between, sensitivity.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42139815/

### COVID-19 pandemic in minor psychiatric disorders among mobile emergency service workers: cohort.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik covid-19 pandemic in minor psychiatric disorders among mobile emergency service workers: cohort. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: revista brasileira de enfermagem. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: covid, pandemic, minor, psychiatric, disorders, among.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42138845/

### Nurse-Led Multidisciplinary Management of Recurrent Cranial Titanium Mesh Exposure After Free Anterolateral Thigh Flap Reconstruction.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik nurse-led multidisciplinary management of recurrent cranial titanium mesh exposure after free anterolateral thigh flap reconstruction. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: the journal of craniofacial surgery. 2026 may 15. Anahtar kavramlar: nurse, led, multidisciplinary, management, recurrent, cranial.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42138285/

### Meta-analysis of the therapeutic effects of different core muscle training on pain and function in patients with chronic non-specific low back pain.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik meta-analiz of the therapeutic effects of different core muscle training on ağrı and fonksiyon in patients with chronic non-specific bel ağrısı. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: frontiers in ağrı research (lausanne, switzerland). 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: ağrı, meta, analysis, therapeutic, effects, different.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42137906/

### Spinopelvic alignment and pubic symphysis widening are associated with postpartum low back pain: a retrospective case-control study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik spinopelvic alignment and pubic symphysis widening are associated with postpartum bel ağrısı: a retrospective case-control study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: frontiers in bioengineering and biotechnology. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: spinopelvic, alignment, pubic, symphysis, widening, associated.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42137627/

### Delayed sacroiliac joint infection after robot-assisted percutaneous iliac screw fixation for tile type C2 pelvic fractures: A case report and literature review.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik delayed sacroiliac joint infection after robot-assisted percutaneous iliac screw fixation for tile type c2 pelvic fractures: a case report and literature review. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: the journal of international medical research. 2026 may. Anahtar kavramlar: delayed, sacroiliac, joint, infection, after, robot.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42136550/

### Response to letter re: Chiropractic spinal manipulative therapy versus physical therapist-led exercise and the risk of cauda equine syndrome in adults with lumbar disc herniation, stenosis, or radiculopathy.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik response to letter re: chiropractic spinal manipulative therapy versus physical therapist-led egzersiz and the risk of cauda equine syndrome in adults with lomber (bel bölgesi) disc herniation, stenosis, or radiculopathy. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: pm & r : the journal of injury, fonksiyon, and rehabilitasyon. 2026 may 14. Anahtar kavramlar: response, letter, chiropractic, spinal, manipulative, therapy.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42135936/
